reviews.title: Not what I expected from Renaissance/Marriott!
reviews.positives: Proximity to Billie Jean Kings USTA center.
reviews.negatives:
I recently stayed at this hotel and encountered several issues that made my experience less than satisfactory.

Parking: The parking situation was poor. I had to pay $38 per night for parking, which I found to be quite steep.

Room Issues: The AC unit in my room was not working. Despite the engineer's efforts, it could not be fixed. When I initially requested an upgrade due to my elite status, I was told that the hotel was completely booked. However, once it became clear that the AC unit couldn't be repaired, multiple room options suddenly became available. This felt dishonest, as it seemed the hotel declined my earned upgrade out of greed but then offered options when faced with a maintenance issue. Additionally, the phone in the room was not functioning, forcing me to use my cell phone to contact the front desk about these problems.

Dining Experience: The service at the steakhouse restaurant was subpar. It was evident that there was a staff shortage. Although the food was okay, everything else was a C-. The restaurant staff frequently passed our table without checking if we needed anything, and our drinks were served only after the food had already arrived.

Overall, the combination of parking fees, room issues, and disappointing service at the restaurant made for a less than ideal stay.

reviews.title: felt misled believing that there is a pool to awim but there was none

reviews.negatives: The pool is closed but per add page it didn’t say it was closed - the reason why i booked was to enjoy the pool.

We went to the pool and the life guard after 30 minutes kept insisting we leave because it was closing time however we didn’t know this.

reviews.title: Convenient location and challenging first-time check-in
reviews.positives: The location is convenient and the hotel is fairly new. Staff was friendly. Cozy but efficient layout for the rooms.
reviews.negatives: It is very easy to get lost to find the hotel. Even after you find the ground level entrance, it is challenging to navigate the lobby and room. The hotel lobby is located on the top level and accessible through designated elevators. You need to take other elevators to get to the floor for your room. More user friendly instruction at the lobby and human assistance would be helpful.

reviews.title: Comfortable hotel convenient for LGA
reviews.positives: Comfortable rooms and rooftop bar and 24h gym
reviews.negatives: Expensive food at the hotel. Limited options for walking/running in the area. Also I booked for pool but sadly it wasn’t available.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location is very good as it's just right next to the mall and walking distance to the main street as well at the subway station.
reviews.negatives: Although I like the minimalistic design, there are not enough surfaces to put my stuff

reviews.title: Superb overall
reviews.positives: didn't have the Breakfast
reviews.negatives: We asked for an extra pillow--had to ask twice...a little slow

reviews.title: Nice and clean hotel near Citifield
reviews.positives: The size of the room and very clean. Amenities.  Located near Citifield and have a shopping center.
reviews.negatives: The only thing is that the shower is separate, and when you come out you’re in the hallway, so you have to get dressed in the cold and exposed. The bathroom — meaning the toilet — is separate from the shower. That’s the only thing I didn’t like. It’s a bit expensive and it doesn’t include at least a continental breakfast.

reviews.title: I’m not a huge fan of the city, but I’d definitely recommend staying here because on the 12th floor it’s like you’re not
reviews.positives:
I was there for a couple of nights. I was in the city for a concert at Citi Field so the location perfect. A 20 minute (give or take) walk. 

The view of the city from the 12th floor was beautiful especially at sunset. 

The food at the hotel restaurant was great. The drinks were even better. Definitely try the Mezcal Mango Passion with or without the smokey flavour. Delicious!!! The bartender those evenings was amazing as well. Shout out to her!!
reviews.negatives: Because it’s located on the top of a mall, you had to go to the 12th floor to go back down to your floor. But hey, stop up for food/drink before you go back down. WiFi wasn’t the greatest but if you’re a member of BonVoy Marriott (which is free to join), it was free at least.

reviews.title: Very Nice Hotel with Great Amenities…
reviews.positives: The Room was Clean and Quiet they had good food in the restaurant. The Pool was Great and the Spa facilities were very nice… A Good location with Accessible transportation…
reviews.negatives: One of the elevators was Broken the whole time i was there. On the third night I was sleeping and around 5:30AM the window Blew Open from the wind leaving me frozen in the room, until somebody came and fixed it.

reviews.title: The closest proximity to the tennis center overcame anything else to make it a positive stay.
reviews.positives: The location was close to the US Open.  Some people actually walked there, but our group was mostly seniors so that wasn't an option.  The desk people helped us find a ride to the park the first day, but not so much after that.  The hotel was relatively new and the view from the 12th floor was awesome.  Some of our group had hor'derves from the bar( ex sliders) that were great.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast was appreciated but had some draw backs.  The omelets did not come with any kind of bread and when we asked for toast they brought out white bread and said there was no whole wheat.  Who eats white bread?  It's poor fiber and generally not healthy! One of our group experienced an unpleasant encounter with the desk at checkout and they didn't take her Am Ex card although Am Ex approved the transaction as viewed on the payment screen.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay in Flushing
reviews.positives: Good size room with a view of the city and great shower. Nice size gym (plus a pool and a tennis court). Also a very pleasant rooftop terrace with view of Manhattan. Convenient if you need to be in Flushing, if you want a place near LaGuardia, Citifield and the U.S. Open, or if you're looking to save money on a stay in Manhattan (if you don't mind a lengthy train ride).
reviews.negatives: The WiFi requires agreeing online to a daily fee which is then refunded at checkout. This wasn't explained to me, and I didn't want to pay for WiFi, so I didn't have WiFi for my stay.

Everyone was very accommodating and pleasant 
1st day Bartender Raphael was sweet and accommodating.  Front desk check in was super accommodating even walked our  luggage to our room. Great location.  Downstairs doorman always super Nice!
reviews.negatives: On 2nd day Restaurant on 12 floor bar female bartender gave poor service.  We ask for some water, bartender served a big glass bottle with no glasses and ran back to the circle of coworkers playing around together goofing around and taking pictures of each other.  Immature n childish.  Had to physically look for  bartender multiple times to ask for a beer.  Couldn’t find her so ask the hostess twice still no response.  Poor service all together while 4 or 5 staff just standing around chit chatting.

reviews.title: very excellent
reviews.positives: The hotel location is in the heart of flushing , many restaurants nearby and downstair is shopping mall. It's take 10-15 min to laguardia airport and about 25 min to JFK. I went to downtown Manhattan everday , it's very easy to take subway line 7 to Times Square ,it takes about 35 -40 minutes , which is quite comfortable because flushing is the first stop to Manhattan , so a lot of seats , and from times square back to flushing also .Every staffs are very nice .The receptionist Jessica , is very nice and very polite. I took the free shuttle bus to Laguardia airport ,the driver ,Sammy is very nice also . I will stay here again next time. Just noted that the breakfast is not the line buffet , it's in the menu that you can choose just one , but anyway it's very good quality.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I loved how welcoming and friendly the door man was and also the front desk. The room was clean and spacious. We had an amazing view of the city and LGA. It was cool to see the planes landing. The rooftop was amazing. I love that right next door was the entrance to the mall. Very convenient!  it was my son's birthday he was very pleased with the hotel. We will be returning  very soon.
reviews.negatives: I wish they had hot chocolate added with the teas and coffee. Also, there was a woman cleaning the lounge who told me from across the room to give me my plate with my muffin on it. I wasn't finished eating it. I just felt like we were a nucinace to her.

reviews.title: Definitely recommend this hotel in Flushing, near the 7 train and LIRR and LaGuardia airport, near lots of delicious foo
reviews.positives:
Beautifully designed hotel with functional room features like hooks to hang up towels and clothes, and a curtain separating the bathroom area and the bed. The toilet and shower are separate, which is similar to how a lot of hotels are designed in Asia. 
The hotel is located above a mall, with lots of food options like a delicious hot pot place and Kura revolving sushi. Also have bubble tea and a food court for other options. 
Close to Che Li, a NY Times highly rated Chinese restaurant which I recommend booking in advance.
reviews.negatives: We got a room on the 11th floor which is the same level as the Lounge. We loved how accessible it was to the Lounge, but some guests talked really loudly and didn’t respect that it was 6 am while walking to the Lounge. Not the fault of the hotel, just something to note.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The property is newly renovated. The rooms are modern and clean. The beds are comfortable. Roof top restaurant is chic & classy. The food is good.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The location is great. Very easy to access all the restaurants in flushing. The roof bar is also great.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: great place for a short stay near both NYC airports
reviews.positives: most comfortable hotel bed and room in the world

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The location of the hotel was very convenient to La Guardia Airport and we appreciated having a shuttle pick us up when we arrived after a long flight. The rooms were modern and nicely furnished. We couldn’t believe how quiet our room was even though we could see the airport runway from our window!
reviews.negatives: We arrived at 10:30 pm and were disappointed that the bar was closed and there weren’t any food options since the restaurant was closed as well. We ended up walking to a cocktail lounge that had a very limited menu.

reviews.title: Fantastic!
reviews.positives: Staff was excellent! Pillows wonderful!  Bedding wonderful! Views were outstanding.  Enjoyed our stay immensely!!!

reviews.negatives: J’avais pris cet établissement pour la piscine, mais elle n’était pas en fonction et semble de pas l’être depuis longtemps et pour longtemps

reviews.title: Superbe hôtel. Le personnel vraiment gentil. Un séjour agréable.
reviews.positives: Presque tout !!
reviews.negatives: Les lits sont très mou…. Difficile pour les douleurs lombaires. Nous n’avons pas trouvé comment régler la température de la chambre… un peu froid.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Sehr schönes Zimmer

reviews.title: Ein toller, unvergesslicher Aufenthalt
reviews.positives: Sehr freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal. Obgleich dies im Grunde für alle zutraf, seien Florence, Stephen und Alberto, letzter war unser Fahrer des Airport-Pick-Up, an dieser Stelle besonders erwähnt. Eine Reklamation wegen des verstopften Abflusses am Waschbecken wurde prompt erledigt. Das Frühstück war zwar nicht im Buffetform, die Auswahl aus der Karte bot aber für jeden etwas und war vor allem sehr lecker. Kaffee, Tee oder Wasser wurde jederzeit nachgeschenkt. Generell sehr aufmerksamer Service. Die Aussicht von der Terrasse auf der 12. Etage, wo sich auch Rezeption, Restaurant und Bar befanden, ist grandios. Schwimmbad und Gym sind auch vorhanden, wurden in den 4 Tagen unseres Aufenthalts jedoch nicht genutzt. Die Lage des Hotels ist zwar etwas versteckt, dafür aber ruhiger als in anderen Stadtteilen und bietet mit der Subway No. 7 eine hervorragende Anbindung in nur ca. 30-35 min direkt ins Herz Manhattans. Sollten wir irgendwann nochmal nach NYC kommen, so ist dieses Hotel auf jeden Fall unser Favorit.
reviews.negatives: Etwas eingeschränkte Kleidungsaufbewahrungsmöglichkeiten, insbesondere wenn man zu dritt ein Zimmer bewohnt.

reviews.title: Ottimo hotel nel Queens
reviews.positives:
Albergo molto bello, personale gentile,ottima colazione posizione,nel Queens, quartiere asiatico pieno di negozietti molto caratteristico,un pó decentrato ma si arriva a manatthan in mezz ora,metro frequenti,lo consiglio 
Terrazza spettacolare con vista meravigliosa
reviews.negatives: Tutto perfetto

reviews.title: Ottima scelta per 1settimana
reviews.positives:
Posizione molto comoda per i servizi (30min di metro da Time Square) e la caratteristica comunità asiatica autentica. Camere molto bene arredate e insonorizzate.
Staff molto gentile e colazione davvero buona. Lo consiglio!!
reviews.negatives: L'unica sbavatura riguarda la pulizia della camera.. con puntualità veniva sistemato il letto, la biancheria e i prodotti, ma non è mai stato pulito il pavimento o i bagni nonostante sia stato indicato in reseption.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Prima net hotel, mooi dakterras.
reviews.negatives:
Het ontbijt stelde niets voor. Erg karig. Niet zoals we in europa gewend zijn. Wat ei, een pannekoek en een paar houdbare boterhammen, gebakken aardappels, wat fruit en yoghurt cupjes met veel suiker.
Vanaf 6 uur in de ochtend kwam er per minuut een vliegtuig zeer laag over het hotel vliegen en dat ging de hele dag door. Dit ivm de vliegroute naar la guardia op zeer korte afstand. De airco op de kamer was zeer luidruchtig.
Het zwembad bleek niet open omdat de staat NY deze nog niet goedgekeurd heeft. Dit word niet op de site vermeld en is pure misleiding. Toen ik het hotel erop aansprak werd hier laconiek op gereageerd.

reviews.title: Drie lekkere dagen gehad in een keurig nieuw hotel voor een redelijke prijs.
reviews.positives: Het is een mooi nieuw hotel midden in China Town Queens en op 5 minuten lopen van de metro die je in 25 minuten naar Times Square in Manhatten brengt. Personeel was erg vriendelijk en we konden de auto om de hoek in de parkeergarage parkeren voor slechts $ 28,- per dag.
reviews.negatives: De buurt is er rommelig omdat er veel hotels in aanbouw zijn en er veel afval op staat ligt. Verder zijn de bedden vrij smal en kort en dat is voor lange mensen niet echt comfortabel.

reviews.title: 朝食要らなかった
reviews.positives: きれい
reviews.negatives: breakfast、wifi

reviews.title: すごくよかった！
reviews.positives: ジムとプールが最高！もっと遅い時間の夜の12時ぐらいまでジャクジーが開いてたらもう言うことなし！
reviews.negatives: ベットがちょこっと小さいかな

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
服務很好，櫃檯人員也有會講中文的
即使有不會講中文的櫃檯人員也是都盡力滿足需求
地點也很好，周圍吃飯、買東西、地鐵都很方便

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 空間舒服
reviews.negatives: 可能就是要到不同樓層要換電梯，才可到房間的樓層

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 地方干净整洁，工作人员很热情
reviews.negatives: 基本没有

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 酒店沒早餐
reviews.negatives: 商務中心不夠

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: 楼下那个黑人保安 不知道怎么回事 我回酒店 要进来 他开门给别人先进 我要去电梯 他不让我去 我说我是在这里的 然后拿出房卡才让我进 我要出门的时候 他也不给我开门 我晕了 我没进来 他先给别人进 不查别人 就算了 还好我带了房卡 要是忘记带我都上不去酒店 还解释不清楚了真的晕死我

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: 订了两间房，给了一间房，超半小时才找到另一间订房信息

reviews.title: 设计上不科学，入住体验差
reviews.positives: 地点
reviews.negatives: 冷气风口直接吹到床上，无法忍受：制冷期间，自动出热风，必须关掉，重新启动（出现多次这样的情况）

reviews.title: 对这个价格来说，总体不太满意
reviews.positives: 地理位置挺好，去法拉盛买吃的很方便
reviews.negatives: 电梯设置很奇怪，一部只能去12楼再下来，房间里半夜会有烟味飘出来，房间很小，不是独栋，12楼像是一个酒吧还是什么，比较嘈杂

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: 想要些开水都没有。

reviews.title: 服务还蛮好
reviews.positives: 平台景观不错
reviews.negatives: 房间还是简陋了

reviews.title: 不过不失
reviews.positives: 员工有礼，位置方便
reviews.negatives:
空调过滤脱落，灰尘满布，貌似很久没有更换，反映前台后，很快有人前来更换
电梯需要上到12梯再换乘其它电梯才能到住宿楼层，不方便，
房间缺少凳子和台面，不方便

reviews.title: 还不错
reviews.positives: 环境装修不错
reviews.negatives: 性价比不高 床不够稳

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 地理位

reviews.title: 吃中餐很方便，去拉瓜迪亚机场很方便。
reviews.positives: 喜欢吃中国菜是个很好的选择，周边都是很好中国餐厅
reviews.negatives: 电梯，好几部电梯，但不是每一部都能下1楼。房间的空调外机实在影响睡眠。

reviews.title: 真是太棒了👏
reviews.positives: 床很舒服，洗漱很方便，健身器材齐全，12层的风景很美，休闲时还可以下棋♟️，很完美的体验。

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: لا شي
reviews.negatives:
مبلغ الحجز ليوم واحد كان 500 $  وتم سحب مبلغ 2000 $ بحجة ان عمليه السحب غير صحيحه . ولم يتم إرجاع المبلغ إلى حسابي إلى الآن 

طاقم العمل سئ جدا جدا جدا 

المنطقه سيئه كأنك بالصين . وريحه قذره

reviews.title: Отличный отель , чистая хорошая сауна , прекрасные швейцары, персонал в ресторане не дружелюбный
reviews.positives: номер в отеле был комфортным, сауна и бассейн очень хорошие
reviews.negatives: я арендовал номер вместе с включенным завтраком, когда мы с женой пришли на завтрак на следующий день, персонал был не дружелюбным , молодой человек который встречает гостей в ресторане дезориентировал нас и сделал вид что не понял что мы ищем ресторан где мы можем получить наш завтрак который был включен в стоимость номера и сказал что в их ресторане такого сервиса нет и послал нас на другой этаж, после чего мы все таки узнали что именно в этом ресторане мы можем получить наш завтрак и вернулись опять ,после чего он нас впустил., далее девушка официантка , она старательно обслуживала гостей которые пришли в ресторан не на завтрак который включен в стоимость номера , а которые платили наличкой , с остальными клиентами которые просто хотели получить свой завтрак который был включен в стоимость номера она была не дружелюбна ., в целом отель очень приятный , но персонал в ресторане "Мужчина который встречает гостей и девушка официантка" ,портит впечатление об отеле.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
I didn’t like that I stay for 4 days . You were taking deposit from me everyday 200 usd , so in total
Four deposits is 800 usd . And already pass more than 2 weeks I still didn’t get my money back !!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Very disappointed with this stay. The room was not properly cleaned — the floor was dusty, and there were small flying insects in the bathroom, which felt very unhygienic. We asked to change rooms, but the second room had the same issue. We always stay here when visiting New York, but this time was a real disappointment. I hope the hotel seriously improves its cleanliness standards, otherwise we won’t be returning.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Room is nice.  Gym is great and the terrace with the view . Front desk stuff not nice . Restaurant stuff is great ( maybe because they are working for the tips that’s why ) but front desk all the young girls can be much nicer!
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like that you were taking  everyday deposit . Can take only one time is enough . And already pass a month I still didn’t get all my deposit back . I stayed for 4 days .

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: location near to the us open
reviews.negatives: l didn’t like the bathroom, and breakfast took to much time to be served and was a little confusing

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives:
When I checked in, the lady at the front desk was very unfriendly.

Also, it's too troublesome to transfer by elevator.

reviews.title: no bad
reviews.negatives: When I checked in, the lady at the front desk was very unfriendly.

reviews.title: A short stay at a nice hotel, wished we could have stayed longer!
reviews.positives: We had a pretty short stay but could not fault the hotel. The staff were very friendly and the hotel itself was very comfortable. The room was modern and beds were super comfy. We wished we had more time to enjoy the facilities and the room.
reviews.negatives: The reception is also accessed via a lift and a different lift is then used to access the rooms, which means you have to take 2 lifts to get to your room from the entrance. The area is also really busy into the late evening.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Confortable bed

reviews.title: Lovely stay - really enjoyed it after the graduation
reviews.positives: Modern and clean
reviews.negatives: Reception on top floor

reviews.title: Clean with friendly staff.
reviews.positives: Much further from the hotel than we thought.
reviews.negatives: Nowhere to grab dinner in the area, no food available at the hotel.

reviews.title: Good but caught covid
reviews.positives: The staffs provide excellent services and friendly. Location is good and lots of nearby restaurants.
reviews.negatives: Few family members caught covid after the stay, need more sanitizing for the rooms. Also the open concept washroom/bathroom does not work well for family.

reviews.title: Great!
reviews.positives: Location is great!
reviews.negatives: If there’s a table to put personal items that would be great!

reviews.title: Not bad
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Not enough cleaning

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Free Champagne
reviews.negatives: The airport driver. Left before the time we were scheduled to leave so we had to wait a whole hour for him to leave again before the scheduled time

reviews.title: Very convenient location for my trip. Did't really get the chance to check out any amenities.
reviews.negatives: One of the bath towels had stains all over. Might need to improve quality control with the cleaning staff.

reviews.title: Good location , nice staff, unforgetable experience
reviews.positives: Very good location , especially for Chinese tour in USA , effective subway to town by 7 trains, also good location near two airports
reviews.negatives: Price is expensive a little bit

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
good hotel if you stay in Queens area. you dont have to worry to find restaurants nearby, they have so many.
the room a little bit small, but functional. it doesnt matter if it's just for sleeping. they have shared parking with other buildings (Mall or office), but you need to pay with reasonable rates.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: new room

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: In the middle of Chinatown Flushing. Well equipped newish room. Rooftop terrace with a bar and music at the weekend. Complimentary glass of sparkling wine. Close to Subway and LIRR Station. Manhattan in 30-40 minutes.
reviews.negatives: Noisy air-co. Photos of a swimming pool which is not actually open, and so is misleading.

reviews.title: great bed.
reviews.positives: The bed is really big and soft. The shower was large and good water pressure. The atmosphere was chill and quiet.
reviews.negatives: The pool was 'under construction'? There was a coffee stain on the bed frame under the mattress. The lifts were a weird layout, like some will go to the ground floor and some don't?

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The rooms are tidy, the right dimension and there is everything you need. The staff is very kind and professional. They are ready to help if you need. The gym and the swimming pool for guests are awsome. And also the distance from the main attractions of New York is fine with the metro. Everything was great. Thanks Reinassance!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff so amazing and kind. Decor a bit different and funky. View amazing! Breakfast very good. Lounge access very good value for money. Pool and spa very nice. Highly recommend. They were wonderful with the kids.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Best hotel in flushing

reviews.title: I love to stay in a different place every time I visit NYC, so this one was a perfect choice.
reviews.positives: The convenience and comfort. The location is close to the Mets stadium but far away from other more touristy spots.
reviews.negatives: The bar closes too early.

reviews.title: Great night sleep
reviews.positives: Everything
reviews.negatives: NA

reviews.title: Excelente opção!
reviews.positives:
O hotel SUPEROU as minhas expectativas. Staff super atencioso, bom café da manhã. A vista do restaurante para Manhattan é fantástica.
Eu sou apaixonada pela cultura chinesa e, "quase" me senti na China dentro desse bairro fantástico. 
O bairro oferece várias opões de restaurantes asiáticos.
reviews.negatives: Nada!
